title: Singular Bank helps bankers move fast with ChatGPT and Codex
optimized_headline: Singular Bank Accelerates Banking Speed Using ChatGPT and Codex Technology
raw_excerpt: Singular Bank built Singularity, an internal assistant using ChatGPT and Codex to help bankers save 60–90 minutes daily on meeting prep, portfolio analysis, and follow-up.
raw_body: Singular Bank built Singularity, an internal assistant using ChatGPT and Codex to help bankers save 60–90 minutes daily on meeting prep, portfolio analysis, and follow-up.
speedrun: Singular Bank has introduced Singularity, a new internal assistant powered by ChatGPT and Codex. This tool is designed to help bankers save between 60 to 90 minutes each day on tasks like meeting preparation and portfolio analysis. By streamlining these processes, Singularity allows bankers to focus more on client relationships and strategic decisions. This innovation is significant as it could enhance productivity in the banking sector at a time when efficiency is crucial.
why_it_matters: Bankers could experience immediate relief from time-consuming tasks, allowing them to dedicate more time to clients and strategic initiatives.
This move reflects a broader trend in finance where firms are increasingly adopting AI to improve efficiency and stay competitive.

lenses.eli12: Singularity is like having a personal assistant that helps bankers get ready for meetings and analyze portfolios faster. By using AI tools like ChatGPT and Codex, it cuts down the time spent on these tasks by up to 90 minutes each day. This means bankers can spend more time helping their clients and making important decisions, which is good for everyone involved.
lenses.pm: For product managers and founders, Singularity highlights a growing user need for tools that enhance productivity in finance. By reducing meeting prep and analysis time, it could lower operational costs while improving service quality. This suggests that there is a significant opportunity to develop AI solutions that address similar efficiency challenges across various sectors.
lenses.engineer: Singularity leverages ChatGPT and Codex to automate tasks traditionally handled by bankers, effectively reducing time spent on meeting prep and portfolio analysis by 60 to 90 minutes daily. These models can process and analyze large amounts of data quickly, enabling more efficient workflows. However, it's important to consider the integration challenges and data privacy issues that may arise when implementing such AI solutions.
